Name: Average time for Queued + Awaiting Assignment across all process variants
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Queued + Awaiting Assignment and the end of the case

Name: Total time spent in Queued + Awaiting Assignment before transitioning to Accepted + In Progress
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Accepted + In Progress'

Name: Minimum time required to complete Queued + Awaiting Assignment when followed by Completed + In Call
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Average duration of Queued + Awaiting Assignment in variants that eventually include Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs

Name: Time from case start until Queued + Awaiting Assignment is first performed
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Queued + Awaiting Assignment and the end of the case

Name: Elapsed time between Queued + Awaiting Assignment and the subsequent occurrence of Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Average time for Queued + Awaiting Assignment compared to the average time for Accepted + Wait - User in the same variant
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Queued + Awaiting Assignment and the end of the case

Name: Total time for Queued + Awaiting Assignment in variants where Completed + In Call appears as a terminal activity
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs

Name: Minimum time between Queued + Awaiting Assignment and Completed + In Call across all cases
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Average cycle time of Queued + Awaiting Assignment when it occurs multiple times within a single case
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Queued + Awaiting Assignment and the end of the case

Name: Time from Queued + Awaiting Assignment to Completed + Resolved in variants that do not contain Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: Average duration of Queued + Awaiting Assignment in variants that transition directly to Accepted + In Progress versus those that loop back to Queued + Awaiting Assignment
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Accepted + In Progress'

Name: Elapsed time between the first and last occurrence of Queued + Awaiting Assignment in multi-occurrence variants leading to Completed + In Call
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment'

Name: Average time for Queued + Awaiting Assignment grouped by country
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and the end of case grouped by the last value of organization country

Name: Total time spent in Queued + Awaiting Assignment before any occurrence of Completed + In Call in the process instance
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Completed + In Call'
